title: PvP
description: The definitive PvP modpack, now designed with Vulkan support. Experience unmatched performance and stability across all major PvP networks.
body:

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/JUiD2Pv6?color=AC162C&logo=modrinth&style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/re-pvp)

[![Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/JUiD2Pv6?color=AC162C&logo=modrinth&style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/re-pvp)
[![Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/JUiD2Pv6?color=AC162C&logo=modrinth&style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/re-pvp)

---

Welcome to **PVP**, the ultimate, feature-packed modpack designed for players who want both deep functionality and flawless performance. Trusted by over **40,000 users**, it has become the go-to choice for competitive Minecraft.

### Why Choose PVP?
We believe you shouldn't have to choose between a rich feature set and high framerates. While other modpacks struggle to balance the two, PVP is built differently. Starting with newer releases, we rebuilt the pack on top of the **VulkanAPI**, unlocking higher FPS and smoother gameplay than ever before. 

We're thrilled to introduce fully tested and verified support for **Minecraft 26.1.2**.

### Let's Talk Numbers
We let the results speak for themselves. Here is how PVP compares to vanilla Minecraft:

| Version | Average FPS | Stability | RAM Usage | Resolution |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **PVP Modpack** | 224+ FPS | **Stable** | ~700 MB | 4k |
| **Vanilla** | 97+ FPS | **Fluctuating** | ~1219 MB | 4k |

### **Whats new?**
- Removed no longer necesary mods
- Updated VulkanMod
- HUD now feels fresh and better
- Better networking

### How You Can Support Us
Are you enjoying the modpack? The best way to support the continued development of PVP (and thousands of other creators) is simply by whitelisting Modrinth on your ad blocker if one is present. Allowing these non-intrusive ads goes a long way in keeping us happy.

*Also, don't forget to drop a <3 on the project page,it means the world to us!*
